title: Golden Apple Cow
description: This is a mod that adds the Golden Apple Cows!
body:
![image of gacow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/084375975278dcf7e757f10dd572a75423a56560.jpeg)

# 🍎 About Golden Apple Cows 🍎
Golden Apple Cows is a lightweight expansion that adds the legendary Golden Apple Cow to your world.

# 🍎 What's in the Mod 🍎
The mod features the **Golden Apple Cow**, a custom entity that integrates seamlessly into existing Minecraft mechanics:

* **Natural Spawning**: These rare cows can only be found roaming in **Mushroom Fields** (Mushroom Islands), making them a true prize for explorers.
* **Custom Loot Tables**: When killed, a Golden Apple Cow drops standard cow loot plus **0 to 2 Golden Apples**, providing a renewable source of powerful food.
* **Breeding**: Just like standard cows, Golden Apple Cows are attracted to and can be bred using **Wheat**, allowing you to start your own golden livestock farm.
* **Spawn Egg**: A fully localized item is available in the Creative inventory for quick testing and world-building.

# 🍎 Getting Started 🍎
To find a **Golden Apple Cow**, set sail for the deep ocean and locate a **Mushroom Field** biome. Once found, you can lead them back to your base with Wheat or breed them on-site to grow your herd.

# 🍎 Join the Conversation 🍎
Found a bug or have a suggestion? 

* **Report Issues**: Use our GitHub Issues tracker to let us know.
* **View Source**: The mod is open source! You can check out the code or build it yourself on our **GitHub Repository**.

# 🍎 Contributing to the Project 🍎
Looking to contribute? **Golden Apple Cows** is open source, meaning anyone interested can contribute code to help improve the project.

* **Code Contributions**: We accept bug fixes and feature improvements via Pull Requests.
* **Building From Source**: Clone the repo and run `gradlew build` to generate your own build files.
